statusLine.command: cat | jq -r 'def f: if . >= 1e6 then (. / 1e6 * 10 | floor / 10 | tostring) + "M" elif . >= 1e3 then (. / 1e3 | floor | tostring) + "k" else tostring end; .context_window as $w | ($w.total_input_tokens // 0 | f) + "/" + ($w.context_window_size // 200000 | f) as $a | ($w.current_usage // {}) as $u | if $u == {} then $a else $a + " | " + (if ($u.cache_read_input_tokens // 0) + ($u.cache_creation_input_tokens // 0) > 0 then ((($u.cache_read_input_tokens // 0) / (($u.cache_read_input_tokens // 0) + ($u.cache_creation_input_tokens // 0)) * 100 | floor | tostring) + "%") else "0%" end) + " | $" + ((($u.input_tokens // 0) / 1e6 * 3 + ($u.output_tokens // 0) / 1e6 * 15 + ($u.cache_creation_input_tokens // 0) / 1e6 * 3 + ($u.cache_read_input_tokens // 0) / 1e6 * 0.3) * 100 | floor / 100 | tostring) end'
